commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

commit.message:
feat: add productivity patterns analysis view

Add a new productivity patterns view that shows when during the day
the user is most active. Features include:
- Hourly activity distribution chart
- Day of week distribution
- Peak hour and peak day insights
- Work style classification (Early Bird, Night Owl, etc.)
- Weekday vs weekend commit distribution
- Daily average commits calculation

This complements the contribution calendar by revealing work patterns
and helping users understand their most productive times.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: extract and store images during document upload (#1309) (#1324)

Add image extraction pipeline for DOCX, PDF, and PPTX uploads:
- New extract_images_from_file() function with format-specific extractors
- _compress_image() helper resizes to max 800px width
- _ocr_images_with_vision() now returns per-image descriptions
- Images stored as ContentImage records in upload/upload-multi/replace-file endpoints
- Filter images < 1KB, cap at 20 per document
- DOCX: extracts surrounding paragraph context via XML relationship walking
- PDF: uses PyPDF2 page.images with page number context
- PPTX: extracts shape pictures with slide title context

fix: complete Phase 3 medium UX gaps + plan High row-rebase fixes

Audit of phase3-frontend-cross-area-ux.md found 5 gaps. All Medium
gaps fixed inline; both High gaps captured in a new plan.

Medium fixes:
- dragdrop: touch drag now adds cross-area-target class (parity
  with mouse path); swap dialog uses formatSlotLabel + "Across Areas?"
  title for cross-area swaps
- modals: drink/open/seal toasts now include formatSlotLabel slot label
- fridge: transfer toast uses formatSlotLabel instead of area name only

Challenged: separate pre-swap cross-area confirmation dialog was
redundant — embedded cross-area awareness into the swap dialog instead.

New plan: phase3-wizard-edit-mode-and-row-rebase.md covers:
- rebaseRows() helper (row-overlap guard fix for existing-area edits)
- Wizard edit mode: Remove/Add area controls in Step 2

fix: YouTube VU/spectrum, album art, OTA update overlay, nocturned restart

- Add YouTube ALSA loopback tee (sub 3) for VU/spectrum analysis
- Extend AudioMonitor.switch_source to support lms/airplay/youtube/spotify
- mpv outputs to alsa/youtube_out (tee → dmix_hdmi + loopback monitor)
- Prefer JPEG thumbnails for YouTube art (Qt 5.15 can't decode WebP)
- Artwork proxy sends Accept header to prefer JPEG/PNG over WebP
- Fix QML update overlay: read d.step field, show progress text, handle complete
- Fix nocturned self-restart: os.execv before starting children (single cycle)
- setup.sh: pcm_substreams=3→4, warn if reboot needed, patch youtube_device

style: remove empty state placeholder, add hint below Add Item button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Task 20: Accessibility — ARIA live region and keyboard navigation (#22)

* Task 20: feat: add ARIA live region for status segments and focus-visible styles

Wrap tests/build status segments in a container with role="status" and
aria-live="polite". Track previous status values to avoid updating the
live region when status hasn't changed (prevents screen reader spam).
Add focus-visible styles for links. Pass previousStatuses tracker through
poll updates in main.js.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Task 20: test: add accessibility tests for ARIA live region and keyboard nav

Tests cover: role="status", aria-live="polite", status change updates
live region, identical status skips live region update, uptime tick
skips live region, close button keyboard navigation (tabIndex, Enter,
Space), focus-visible styles, no autofocus, all links tabbable,
correct tab order (branch -> SHA -> status links -> dismiss).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #22 review feedback for accessibility implementation

- Remove null sentinel pattern: previousStatuses defaults to {} instead
  of null, eliminating throwaway tracker objects and ensuring first-render
  statuses are always recorded for subsequent comparison.
- Fix undefined vs null mismatch: _hasStatusChanged uses `in` operator
  to distinguish "never tracked" from "tracked as null".
- Extract _buildStatusContainer helper: consolidates ~20 lines of
  duplicated DOM construction into a single function with isLive flag.
- Fix CSP violation: replace inline style.display with .bb-live-region
  CSS class defined in Shadow DOM stylesheet.
- Consolidate focus-visible CSS: merge dismiss and link focus-visible
  rules into a single selector group.
- Fix keyboard tests: dispatch real KeyboardEvent objects (Enter keydown,
  Space keyup) in addition to click verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: alex-claude <alex@alexs-Mac-mini.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(auth): set SessionProvider basePath for sub-path deployment (/sunjin)

next-auth v4 SessionProvider does not automatically inherit Next.js basePath.
Explicitly set basePath='/sunjin/api/auth' so client-side auth calls target
/sunjin/api/auth/session instead of /api/auth/session.

fix: normalize mon.data/mon.type order and precedence across 13 files

- Fix operator precedence bug in sounds.js:200 oracle_sound:
  `mtmp.data || mtmp.type !== mons[PM_ORACLE]` always returned true
  because it evaluated as `mtmp.data || (mtmp.type !== ...)`.
  Fixed to `(mtmp.data || mtmp.type) !== mons[PM_ORACLE]`.

- Reverse wrong `mtmp.type || mtmp.data` order to `mtmp.data || mtmp.type`
  in: mhitu.js, minion.js, priest.js, do.js, wizard.js, detect.js,
  dokick.js, polyself.js

- Add missing .data fallback to `mtmp.type || {}` patterns in:
  quest.js, do_name.js, mondata.js, trap.js

commit.message:
Fix workflow commit conflicts with stash-restore strategy

Instead of git rebase (which fails on merge conflicts with
manually-pushed code changes), copy generated files to /tmp,
reset working tree, pull remote cleanly, then restore generated
files on top and commit. This avoids all merge conflicts since
dashboard/docs are fully regenerated each run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(fcitx5-vinput-bin): handle multi-line checksum arrays in upstream.sh

The old sed replacement only matched a single line, breaking multi-element
sha256sums arrays by closing the array after the first hash and leaving
subsequent hashes as orphaned syntax. Now extracts all existing checksums,
replaces only the first one, and writes back as a single-line array.

commit.message:
Restructure: season-centric navigation

NAVIGATION
- Management sidebar: Dashboard, Students, Coaches, Seasons, Settings
  (Teams/Attendance/Payments removed — now accessed inside a season)
- Seasons list: season name is a clickable link; "Enter Season →" button
  on every row (desktop + mobile)

SEASON HUB  /seasons/[seasonId]
- layout.tsx — fetches season, wraps pages in SeasonNav (breadcrumb
  "All Seasons / [Name] [status badge]" + horizontal tab bar)
- page.tsx — season overview dashboard: enrolled count, teams count,
  sessions held, attendance rate, payment collection %
- teams/page.tsx — teams for THIS season (uses existing TeamsClient)
- attendance/page.tsx — attendance for THIS season (existing client)
- payments/page.tsx — payments for THIS season (existing client)
- enrolled/page.tsx — enrolled students table + Manage Enrollments button
- settings/page.tsx — edit name/dates, manage activity dates, status
  transitions (inline, no modal needed for workflow)

All lib data-fetchers (teams, attendance, payments) now accept an
optional seasonId param; fall back to active season when absent, so
old direct URLs (/teams, /attendance, /payments) still work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix agents failing with exit code 1: add non-root user to Dockerfiles

Claude Code CLI refuses --dangerously-skip-permissions when running as
root. All Dockerfiles now create a non-root 'agent' user and switch to
it before CMD, fixing bypassPermissions mode in Daytona sandboxes.

Add difficulty scaling with 4 modes and starting locations

Implement difficulty system (easy/normal/hard/permadeath) with enemy
HP/ATK/spawn multipliers. Permadeath mode deletes save on death and
shows permanent death message. Add starting location system with
village, tavern, and cave options. Bump save version to 3.

Updates documentation directory structure from numbered prefixes to simplified category names, aligning with domain-driven structure. Removes obsolete editor config files (.cursor, .windsurf) and updates all cross-references in documentation files to reflect the new structure.

* ci(workflows): switch all GitHub Actions to self-hosted runner

Replace ubuntu-latest (and OS matrix) with self-hosted across all 17
workflow files. The azure-vnet-ghost runner is registered on the
prod-runner-listener VM in Azure and serves this repo.

This bypasses the GitHub-hosted runner billing lock and runs CI on
the existing Azure infrastructure.

Also includes regenerated sync outputs (date stamp update).

Update all .agentkit/templates/github/workflows/*.yml to use
runs-on: self-hosted instead of ubuntu-latest. This ensures
sync-generated workflows target the azure-vnet-ghost runner
and the drift check passes.

commit.message:
Add false positive interpretation and ML strategy to UPDATES.md

Explains what false positives actually mean for model training:
- FPs are random trading days, not muted clinical reactions
- ~43% of dataset may be mislabeled if noise class is uncleaned
- Corrupts the negative class; positive (high-move) class is clean
- Recommends removing FPs after full validation run
- Documents 3 options with expected post-cleanup dataset size
- Adds ML-ready filter recipe for clean training set
